methods.description: Process for preparing oracle bone samples for radiocarbon dating, including pretreatment to remove contamination, combustion to oxidize components, and reduction and graphitization to convert CO2 into graphite.

steps.description: 14C measurements of oracle bones using EN-AMS and NEC compact AMS.

methods.description: Calibration of radiocarbon dates using Bayesian methods to narrow down the range of calendar date probability distribution.

methods.method_name: Establishment and Adjustment of the Model OB
methods.description: Construction and adjustment of a Bayesian model for oracle bone calibration, including verification of sample correspondence with time periods and exclusion of samples with low agreement indexes.
